name: TrueNAS SCALE NAS
description: Full NAS with ZFS, SMB/NFS shares, Docker apps. Requires TrueNAS ISO and a separate data disk for ZFS pool.

post_create.notes: 1. Install via VNC console. 2. Choose boot disk (32GB). 3. After install: remove ISO, set boot order to disk. 4. Create ZFS pool on data disk. 5. Set static IP.

companion_mcp.name: TrueNAS
companion_mcp.install: claude mcp add truenas -- truenas-mcp --truenas-url VM_IP --api-key API_KEY
